Interface Triple<T1,T2,T3>

All Superinterfaces:
Comparable<Triple<T1,T2,T3>>, Serializable
All Known Subinterfaces:
Triplet<T>
public interface Triple<T1,T2,T3> extends Serializable, Comparable<Triple<T1,T2,T3>>

    default boolean
    isEqual()
    Returns true if value of getOne() is equal to value of getTwo() and getThree().
    default boolean
    isSame()
    Returns true if value of getOne() is the same instance as the value of getTwo() and getThree().
    Triple<T3,T2,T1>
